changeSet.author: asin
changeSet.createView: select row_number() OVER () AS rowid , rep_tp_id, rep_nm, msr_prd_id, msr_prd_tp, msr_prd_caption, max(finish_dttm) finish_dttm, jsonb_agg(json_build_object('rep_id',rep_id,'status',status,'format',format,'reason',reason)) statuses from dm.reg_reports where status !='NEW' group by rep_tp_id, rep_nm, msr_prd_id, msr_prd_tp, msr_prd_caption, msr_prd_st_dttm order by rep_tp_id,msr_prd_tp, msr_prd_st_dttm
